steps.title: Identify the stated goal
steps.content: The student wants to “specify the average length of the green iguana.” This goal is explicit. From the notes, one piece of information directly addresses it: “It has an average length of 4.8 feet.”

steps.title: Find the choice that includes that specific information
steps.content: D includes the average length of 4.8 feet. Choices A, B, and C include information about diet, habitat, or location, but none specify the length. That matches choice D — D is correct.
